From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

[![logo](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/99/Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg/40px-Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg)

Look up ***[Nankang](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/Nankang "wiktionary:Nankang")*** in Wiktionary, the free dictionary.

**Nankang** may refer to:

## Mainland China

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Nankang&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Mainland China")]

* [Nankang District, Ganzhou](/wiki/Nankang_District,_Ganzhou "Nankang District, Ganzhou"), Jiangxi
* [Nankang District](/w/index.php?title=Nankang_District,_Lushan&action=edit&redlink=1 "Nankang District, Lushan (page does not exist)") (南康镇), in [Lushan City](/wiki/Lushan_City "Lushan City"), Jiangxi
* [Nankang, Guangxi](/w/index.php?title=Nankang,_Guangxi&action=edit&redlink=1 "Nankang, Guangxi (page does not exist)") (南康镇), town in [Tieshangang District](/wiki/Tieshangang_District "Tieshangang District"), Beihai, Guangxi

## Taiwan

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Nankang&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Taiwan")]

* [Nankang Rubber Tire](/wiki/Nankang_Rubber_Tire "Nankang Rubber Tire") (南港輪胎股份有限公司), tire manufacturer based in Taipei
* [Nangang District, Taipei](/wiki/Nangang_District,_Taipei "Nangang District, Taipei") (南港區)
